original text:
Pranshu is a grad from NMIMS, Mumbai - hence her crazy love for Bombay! Loves all things art (and we thought she only loved MS Excel and Powerpoint.. oh and Dropbox! :P); is often seen doodling with charcoal pencils or having never ending design discussions (wars!) or convincing people to hand-paint one office wall. Has been dancing almost all her life and her most recent love was Kathak (built the much needed patience for handling the erstwhile corporate life :P). Before her passion for new technology and design lured her into Intap Labs, she was spotted juggling multiple hats at Sun and Pitney Bowes. A self-proclaimed foodaholic, she strongly believes that there is no love greater than the love of food!
Sachin is a product of NIT, Jaipur.We say product, because his dedication to work boderlines that of a machine! He believes "Programming" is second greatest pleasure on earth,because, undoubtedly, "sleeping" is the first one! He speaks several languages such as C, C++, Objective C, JAVA and CUDA :P and believes one should never add comments to the code, because if it was hard to write, it should be hard to understand. :) Apart from programming, he loves to innovate in the kitchen while naively adding the disclaimer of "EAT AT YOUR OWN RISK". He started his 'corporate' life with Intap Labs and thanks God that it doesn't feel corporate-y at all ! He has been working across various Intap Lab products and has spear-headed mobile development for CultureAlley.
Shweta loves to dance, read, write, travel, work, and eat as less as possible. Hailing from the gorgeous town of Shimla, she's a social cause promoter, and a highly eccentric thinker. Her true love, however, remains to be dogs, and has a "puppy face" of her own, when she spots one! Fresh out of college(LSR ), with her Master's Degree in Literature, she scouted her many options and decided that she wanted a job role that was dynamic, fun and exhilarating in nature. Also one that did not involve unending hours of proof reading :P. Pointing out grammatical errors is second nature to her, so BEWARE! Having had a taste of CultureAlley/Intap Labs beforehand, she decided to take it up full swing, and is currently associated with all sorts of work from content generation to marketing as well as operations.
Jyotsna is the guru for all things admin so if you want to get your way around the site - be nice to her :) She hails from Rajasthan, is passionate about life and people and is a strong contender for the most garrulous person alive. Crazy about sports - she's also our in-house talkathon champion! An avid singer and dancer, she works with music throbbing in her eardrums, while nonchalantly miming lyrics!
We are looking for passionate and totally awesome people for Technical Associates as well as Management Associates. If you think you have it in you then please email us on contact@culturealley.com with a short resume stating 'Recruitment' in the email subject!
